§7Guide Book #44§r
§lSkeleton Guard§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Skeleton, Undead, Monster.
•§lSpawns in§r: All overworld surfaces, Underground.
•§lHealth§r: 20

•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Water.
•§lPossible drops§r: Bone, Chain Links, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r: Cave Wolf, Creepers, Wolf.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem, Villagers, Player's aggressive

tamed mobs.
•§lEquipped weapon§r: Stone Sword
•§lEquipped armor§r: Chainmail Armor
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 3
•Can burn in daylight.
•Can pick up weapons and equip it.
•Can pick up armor and equip it.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘More disciplined than typical undead, the Skeleton Guard roams the land in chainmail armor, enforcing a forgotten command with cold, unyielding purpose.
